entry.title: Re: AMDP Class - Database procedure

entry.title: Re: ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI - DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
entry.content:
Better now?
I am also adding the dump in ST22

entry.title: Re: Best patches for BI 4.3 SP04
entry.content:
Hello, I encountered a problem with BO4.3SP4 Patch 400.
Why?
The version is not 100% compatible with SAP Datasphere, which requires at least BO4.3 SP4 Patch 600.
So we'll upgrade to 1100, which is more recent and will correct this error.

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating a custom AI agent on the BTP
entry.content:
Thank you @prasad_gvk2, The Large Language Model is very instrumental here. It's not just as obvious as in a chatbot.


The LLM for instance takes the user request "Has invoice xyz been paid" and assesses, which of the tools/functions to which it has access, can help answer that request. For this assessment it is using the comments that are within these functions, ie

"""Returns an invoice's status, ie whether it has been paid or not.

Args:
invoice_id: The invoice id
"""

The LLM also produces the Python code, that calls this function, ie with the invoice number from the incoming text

entry.title: DRF IDocs Issue
entry.content:
Hello !

I'm currently working on implementing Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) for data replication between two systems:

SENDER SYSTEM: S46 (200)

RECEIVER SYSTEM: S41 (106)

Sender system

Receiver system

I have completed all the configurations. The data are not getting replicated in the receiver system. 

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

Vignesh

entry.title: Re: Introduction to SAP DRC and Integration aspects
entry.content:
Bonjour,

Nous avons des problemes avec le "peppol" réseau. Je pense qu'il sera fixé eventuellement.

Mais aussi apres ca, nous avons besoin de construire un "ebilling" portail. Il y a plus de vingt "ebilling" portails et plus de cent clients qui reçoivent leur facteur entre ces portails.  Le format est "LEDES" (legal electronic data exchange standard) qui est pour le norme des avocats aux Etats Unis.  C'est possible avec DRC?

Merci - Bruce

entry.title: Accounting entry for Non-Valuated material - stock transfer 301 movement type
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a scenario where Accounting view with valuation class is maintained in material master data for non-valuated material. Due to this, system is showing error for account determination in MIGO movement type 301. 

Now, After maintaining the GL account in OBYC for GBB-VBR, system generates only CO document with ZERO value and do not create accounting document when 301 movement is posted.

Quantity is updated in CO document with respective cost centers of sending and receiving plants.

Requesting to kindly provide your inputs if this system behavior is correct or not.?

Is there any other way to handle this scenario.?

Thank you,

Sumant

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged RAP Query Implementation: Filter calls identification in if_rap_query_provider~select
entry.content: "opening a filter dropdown in a Fiori Elements List Report and clicking the Go button to load the full list". they call same entity? what is your data model.....

entry.title: What Architecture / Porgraming Modell to use when creating a custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
Hi together,

May you could help us to understand the topic better and get the best practice implementation for an S/4HANA 2023 on premise system.

 

The Requirement:

A collegue created an SQ2 View with several Z-Tabels in SAP GUI and would like to have a custom PDF Form for this. Containing our global design (logo, footer, addresses, etc.). There should be a Fiori Elements App with a print button to prin the selected items.

 

Restrictions:

  • SAP System is on premise S/4HANA 2023 AS ABAP 7.58
  • Adobe Form Technology should be used

 

What we have tried so far / ideas we had to solve the problem:

  • Application Programming Model for SAP Fiori

Created a CDS Datamodel based on the SQ2 view. This dat model was exposed as an Business Object (BOPF) with the action print. The print action calls a traditional print programm (FP_JOB_OPEN, CALL <Generated_Form_Function_Module>, FP_JOB_CLOSE. Fiori Elements App with List Floorplan was created. This approach seems to work.
 

  • RESTful Application Programming

Created CDS entity from SQ2 View. Created behaviour definition with action print. Implemented the classic print programm into the behaviour definition, but got a shortdump, that SUBMIT statement is not supported inside of RAP, which is used in FM FP_GET_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME, to get the generated Form. So we had to stop here.
 

Open Questions

  • What about the S/4HANA Output Management and Fragment based Adobe Forms (with ODATA Service as data provider)?

This topic is hard to grasp, in terms of a custom business object, like we have it here, because of the Z-Tables. I understand that SAP implements the connection to the SAP S/4 HANA Output Management into the SAP Standard Application like Goods Movement or Purchase Order and then you can customize it.

 

  • But how to do this with a custom Application like we have it here? Is this even possible?
  • Can we utilize the Fragment based Forms only with the SAP S/4HANA Output Management?
     
  • What about Key User extensiblity Tools?

I read about Key User Extensiblity and saw that you can create your own business objects and CDS views. Is it somemhow possible to connect these to the S/4HANA Output Management and Adobe Fragment based forms?

I hope you could help us to find the correct approach here.

 

Thank you in advance and Best regards

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Cloud Identity Service with MFA and TOTP
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, In your profile, activate the MFA and scan the QR code from Microsoft Authenticator App.

entry.title: Re: Post missed depreciation for previous period. Is ABAA an option?
entry.content: The Note was removed from SAP. As outdated content. Can you share the program name

entry.title: Issue with FTPO Adapter in Integration Framework 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working with Integration Framework 2.0 and encountering an issue when using the FTPO Adapter Type.

I am attempting to send an XML file from a local folder, using the FILI atom, to an SFTP server via the FTPO Adapter.

Please find below a description of the scenario:

  • Scenario Overview:

     

  • Structure of the XML file created in the local folder:

     

  • Inbound Atom (FILI): Connection is configured via SLD and tests successfully

     

  • FTPO Adapter Call in BizFlow

     

  • Outbound (Void)

     

After testing the scenario, the following results are shown in the Monitor window:

  • The status is "Completed"
    • However, the XML file is not transferred to the SFTP server.

 

  • When checking the BizIos1 details, the SFTP server parameters appear to be correctly mapped

     

  • The End BizFlow step appears to be empty

     

Additionally, I have verified the SFTP connection using FileZilla and WinSCP, and I am able to create and update files without any issues.

Could you please assist in identifying what might be going wrong?

Best regards.

entry.title: Can LMS have separate Login ??
entry.content:
Dear Team

is it possible to have separate login for Success Factor and Learning Management System (LMS) ? as of now employees login to Success Factor and from there they navigate to LMS. We are exploring a way for user to directly login to the LMS rather than navigating through Success Factor (BIZX)

entry.title: Re: Process Chain: load step success if file not found in AL11
entry.content: Any inputs please

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: @fabianlupa Rest assured that the feature of SAP Cloud Connector integration is still important; though the argument of legal requirements is a week one (IMHO). If you are allowed to use SAP BTP (and other ABAP-based cloud solutions), you already accepted that your source code is managed by default by SAP in a repository that is not under your direct influence. "Bring your own Git" just opens the possibility to optionally use a different repository provider.

entry.title: Re: Need Help Creating An API Call In SAP Build Process A...
entry.content:
To create an API call in SAP Build Process Automation, follow these steps:

Prerequisites

  1. Service Key: Ensure you have a service key from the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). You can create a service key for the SAP Build Process Automation instance by following the instructions here 

Steps to Create an API Call

  1. Add an API Trigger: You can integrate and manage external applications via API endpoints in SAP Build Process Automation 

  2. Configure API Trigger: Start an instance of your process using an API call, with the inputs for the call configured in the process editor. These inputs can then be used as input fields in your process, for example, in a form or approval form 

  3. Access API Documentation: SAP Build Process Automation APIs documentation is available on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. For more information, see SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: WFA Starter Packages Not Loading with No import logs generating
entry.content:
Hello, 

@YSE-1 

We are loading the advanced starter package for a WFA implementation.  We do currently have a ticket for an OLAP maintenance error on the initial import we found based on another community post so not sure if this issue is related or different. 

When we go to load the adv or starter packages from the implementation kit, the import screen spins.  After waiting some time, we refresh the page and look at the import status.  Nothing appears to be happening with no log outputs or tables generated.  The main home page does say the system is ready for OLAP processing.

Can you let us know if this needs another ticket?

Appreciate your help!

entry.title: Re: PO Creation and Approval timing is wrongly showing in...
entry.content:
Hello @EverrenewEnergy 

Thank you for your observation.

Based on the workflow behavior and timestamp alignment, it is likely that the task attributed to Mr. Sumanth was system-generated, possibly due to a background step or a substitution rule, rather than a manual intervention. In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, such tasks may appear in the workflow log if a user is assigned as a backup approver or if a parallel step is configured in the workflow definition.

To confirm:

  • Please check for any active substitution rules assigned to Mr. Sumanth
  • Review the Workflow Definition to identify any parallel or escalation logic that could involve Mr. Sumanth.

Let me know if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged RAP Query Implementation: Filter calls identification in if_rap_query_provider~select
entry.content:
the datamodel is the one in my post 😉 the filter dropdown shown in the screenshot is referencing the element company of custom entity ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS. 

 

io_request->get_entity_id( ).

always returns "ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS"

Regards ,

entry.content:

SAP Solution Manager SOLMAN Test Suite

there is a concept for external logins but users should exists in BIZx

entry.content: Can someone from SAP respond please.

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged RAP Query Implementation: Filter calls identification in if_rap_query_provider~select
entry.content: if they call the same entity? yes. In both cases the implementation of zcl_custom_delivery_status is called. and in both cases io_request->get_entity_id() as part of if_rap_query_provider~select returns "ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS"

entry.title: SAP Business ByDesign 25.05 is now ready!
entry.content:
SAP Business ByDesign 25.05 is now ready!

SAP Business ByDesign 25.05 is now available and the SAP Business ByDesign What’s New blog gives you an overview about the most important new features of SAP Business ByDesign 25.05. These are the so called Focus Topics (  ).
For these Focus Topics, additional in-depth blogs and videos might be available - just click the link next to the Focus Topic in the What’s New blog.

To get an overview about all new features of SAP Business ByDesign in 25.05 please go to the What's New document.

Cross Topics

  • Refactored SAP Business ByDesign app for Microsoft Teams
    The application has been technically upgraded to utilize the latest Microsoft Teams framework, incorporating the newest technology. 
  • UX Polishing and Accessibility Enhancements
    Various UX polishing updates have been implemented to improve accessibility, including focus visibility in high contrast themes, visible focus on tabs, etc. 
  • Disable ‘Easy Form Editor’ in Form Template Maintenance
    Disabled the Submenu Easy Form Editor under Open button for the users who does not have Write access for Form Template Maintenance Screen.
  • Business Analytics work center - Acc Term Empl Report Enhancement
    The updated report now includes multiple rehire scenarios and history, providing customers with comprehensive insights into employee turnover and rehire patterns.
  • Enhanced Error Messaging
    The new error message enhances user experience by clearly indicating the issue, making it easier to understand and resolve preview errors.
  • PSM release query_by_element for BO APPLICATION_LOG
    Customer can now access and build custom PDI solution using query_by_element action in  APPLICATION_LOG Business Object in order to get details of a mass data run application log details like administrative data.
For detailed information about What’s New in the Cross Topics area, please click here.

Customer Relationship 
Management


 

 

  • PSM enablement of 
    Write-Access for field FulfillmentBlockingReasonCode in CUSTOMER_CONTRACT Business Object
    Customer can now access and build custom PDI solution using the field FulfillmentBlockingReasonCode in Customer Contract.
    Write-Access for Node COVERED_OBJECT and DESCRIPTION field in CUSTOMER_QUOTE Business Object
    Customer can now access and build custom PDI solution using Node COVERED_OBJECT and DESCRIPTION field in CUSTOMER_QUOTE Business Object
  • Special rounding off logic enablement for OTCS transaction and Manual Invoice Requests
    A new rounding logic has been implemented for Over-The-Counter Sales (OTCS) and Manual Invoice requests. The rounding difference amount will be calculated using the data stored in the back-end and will be displayed as Rounding Difference under the Pricing Tab of the document. 
For detailed information about What’s New in the Customer Relation. Management area, please click here.

  • Moldova
    New Tax Number Type
    Customers will be able to add this newly created tax number type "Fiscal Identification Number" for customer and supplier accounts.
  • Virgin Ilands
    New Tax Number Type
    Customers will be able to add the newly created tax number types " 1.BVI - Company Number and Tax Identification Number (TIN)" for customer and supplier accounts..
  • India
    Place of Supply with respect to supply of goods to Unregistered Person
    Customers will be now legally complaint with respect to their accounts which do not have GSTIN number by having tax determination based on delivery address instead of billing address.
    Input Service Credit Distribution
    This feature is implemented to ensure distribution of input tax credit across units with the same Permanent Account Number (PAN), to comply with new Central Tax amendment. 
For detailed information about all country/region-specific features, please click here.

Solution Extensions

 

Take a look at the recently added partner soultions for SAP Business ByDesign in the SAP Store.

The Partner innovation roadmap is part of the official Business ByDesign roadmap and can be found here.

entry.title: How to do bulk upload for OData v4 service in 1 Batch and separate Change Set
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a SapUi5 App where I want to do bulk upload of records from a Excel File. The end point is a Odata v4 service Entity and I want to combine multiple Create requests in single batch but each create request should have a separate Change set so that if any of the Create request fails, it does not stop creation of any other records.

I have tried below approach as per the documentation here - Batch Control, but it still sends request with single ChangeSet in a batch but I want each request to have separate ChangeSet.

const groupId = "bulkUpload";
var oOperation = oModel.bindList("/WarehouseData", null, null, null, {
      $$groupId: groupId,
});
excelSheetsData.map(async (value) => {
       var payload = {
           IsActiveEntity: true,
           plant : value.plant,
           warehouse : value.warehouse,
           quantity : value.quantity
       };
       oOperation.create(payload);
});
oModel.submitBatch(groupId)

And below is the Payload sent in the request.

--batch_id-1746450894238-202
Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary=changeset_id-1746450894238-203

--changeset_id-1746450894238-203
Content-Type:application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding:binary
Content-ID:0.0

POST WarehouseData?sap-client=100 HTTP/1.1
Accept:application/json;odata.metadata=minimal;IEEE754Compatible=true
Accept-Language:en
X-CSRF-Token:v3SZ-0xnE3T2eBD-FRrPKg==
Content-Type:application/json;charset=UTF-8;IEEE754Compatible=true

{"IsActiveEntity":true,"plant":"A100","warehouse":"1001","quantity":10}
--changeset_id-1746450894238-203
Content-Type:application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding:binary
Content-ID:1.0

POST WarehouseData?sap-client=100 HTTP/1.1
Accept:application/json;odata.metadata=minimal;IEEE754Compatible=true
Accept-Language:en
X-CSRF-Token:v3SZ-0xnE3T2eBD-FRrPKg==
Content-Type:application/json;charset=UTF-8;IEEE754Compatible=true

{"IsActiveEntity":true,"plant":"A100","warehouse":"1001","quantity":10}
--changeset_id-1746450894238-203--
--batch_id-1746450894238-202--
Group ID: $auto

Please let me know if there is something wrong in the approach I have used to do Bulk upload or is there any other approach I can use to achieve the requirement.

Thanks & Regards,

Vishal Sharma

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged RAP Query Implementation: Filter calls iden...
entry.content:
if that is the case, just create two entity,

if not, I don't think you can differentiate the scenario.

you can reuse the code at backend, but to differentiate the scenario, you need two entity.

entry.title: Re: Here come a new SAP challenger ¡
entry.content: In any case, make sure to follow the SAP Master Data Governance topic page to be up to date.

entry.title: Production Order Split
entry.content:
Production order can be split into separate production orders. When the time for example there is some capacity issue. The split production orders are then executed separately. Production order you want to split must be released, and with some other status, please see the below description on help document.

Below you can see the steps tested in SAP internal system.

The production order was released, and one of the operation was confirmed with full quantity 10 pc.

I would like to start the splitting from operation 0020.

Select this operation and go to Functions - Split Order.

Then a new screen shown to let you select the Split Method (Split with same material or with different material), input the split quantity and other information if you want to change.

After clicking Split Order, a pop-up screen showed the serial numbers. This is because the material to be split is serial managed material. You can select the serial numbers that will be split to other production order.

After confirmed, the order split has been executed. Now the operation 0020 has a new status SPLT, and the operation quantity from this operation have been change to 7 pc. Because 3 pc has been split to other operation.

Save the production order and reopen it, you can see a tree structure on the left to show the parent order and child order:

The operation in the child order is starting from the 0020 operation which was split from the parent order. The child order was default released.

The split order function can also be used in MTO scenario.

See bellow test case. FG228 is a MTO material with Strategy Group 20 maintained.

The order with sales order assigned can also be split:

In the Stock/Requirements List, you will see 2 production orders (Parent order and Child order)to fulfill the same sales order.

If you select the Split Method as “Split with Other Material”. The components and operations in the child order will be copied from the new material number.

entry.title: Re: Possibility to edit default continuous feedback quest...
entry.content:
@jo21 Yes it is possible you can update these question using Manage language>custom labels.

Please mark this as answer so that other can take benefits from this.

Thanks

Mridul

Customer Hierarchies

entry.title: Re: Event Based Revenue Recognition - deferred revenue po...
entry.content:
Hello Chuma,

Thanks a lot for drafting the proposed approach.

How to achieve this? So far, whatever we tried, e.g. testing with different item categories, different account assignment groups in product master(XA, X5, X9...). We always get the revenue posted immediately on the default revenue account:

  • TAD (or custom Z* service category): For prepaid services – set to defer revenue at billing and trigger recognition later.
    • Set where and how?

If we make the Provider contract/Service contract work, do we then still need the Revenue contract? How would this be normally triggered - automatically from the Universal/Event-based revenue recognition?

Would you know, which scope items should we implement for this approach?

Thank you!
Martin

entry.title: MDK style is not applying to iOS app
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing a challenge with styles not getting applied to MDK controls like ObjectCard, 

SimplePropertyCell in iOS application, while in android app it is working perfectly.
Please find attached code for reference.
 
SAP MDK SDK Version: 24.11.3-001

Regards,

Girish

entry.title: Re: How to do bulk upload for OData v4 service in 1 Batch...
entry.content:
Text from the help you linked - Batch requests for update groups with a submit mode different from $direct are queued per group ID. A batch request with changes is only sent if the previous batch request for the same group ID is returned and processed. In this case, all submitted changes for that group ID are combined in one batch request; changes associated with different calls to ODataModel.submitBatch use different change sets inside the batch request.

I have bolded the important part which suggests different change sets is achievable by separate calls to submitBatch.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How to do bulk upload for OData v4 service in 1 Batch...
entry.content:
Hi @Ryan-Crosby,

Thanks for your quick response.

I tried the approach you have suggested by calling submitBatch with same group-id in a loop for each record, but it still sends request with same ChangeSet ID.

const groupId = "bulkUpload";
var oOperation = oModel.bindList("/WarehouseData", null, null, null, {
      $$groupId: groupId,
});
excelSheetsData.map(async (value) => {
       var payload = {
           IsActiveEntity: true,
           plant : value.plant,
           warehouse : value.warehouse,
           quantity : value.quantity
       };
       oOperation.create(payload);
       oModel.submitBatch(groupId)
});

good blog with valuable hints...

Cheerio
Harry

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged RAP Query Implementation: Filter calls iden...
entry.content:
I don't get your point.

scenario 1: List all data of ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS
scenario 2: get filter values for a data element of ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS

How would I use the second entity ("filter entity") in the list report and where would I reference it in the custom entity ZCE_DELIVERY_STATUS?

entry.title: Re: Getting started with your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Project - Dodging the System Re-Provisioning Bullets
entry.content:
@harrystrauss 

Yes, then we need a stop gap arrangement instead settling for a Re-Provisioning.

Good catch.

Meganathan.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model: What’s New as of 2025-05-05?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community! 

May has arrived, and it's time to explore what’s fresh and enhanced in SAP PaPM Cloud UM. I'm here to guide you through the latest updates and new features in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Universal Model (SAP PaPM Cloud UM). 

If you’d like to revisit earlier updates shared by my colleague, feel free to browse all past blog posts using the PaPMCloudUMWhatsNew tag. 

Let’s start! 

 Model

 Prefer currency field master data over SAP common currencies in Allocation/Model Allocation 

In the SAP PaPM Cloud UM application the decimal places for currencies that are automatically being assigned to an amount is defined on the Standard table SAP Common Currencies.   

A new feature is introduced so that the user can define as master data/association field how many decimal places an amount has for a certain currency.   

The following steps are to be carried out to use this enhancement  

  1. Create a Model Entity.  
  2. Assign a key figure field with type small integer and assign a value help tag Currency Scale. The Currency Scale value help tag identifies a key figure field with small integer type that it is to be used as the decimal place of the amount. 
  3. Create an Association Field for the Model Entity so that it can act as currency master data.  
  4. As for the data, assign a number for the key figure from number 2 that will serve as a decimal place holder. 

 

      5. Assign the created Association field from step 3 on a model entity that is using an Amount field. The Association field will now adapt the decimal places defined using the Currency Scale Value help tag.

Note that if a certain currency is not part of the master data it will adapt the decimal places defined on Standard table SAP Common Currencies. 

Model Screen

   Inline Data Preview – Feature Description

The Inline Data Preview feature is now available in both and Hierarchy views, offering users the ability to preview and interact with data directly within their current workflow.

For Network and Hierarchy, please refer to our SAP Help Portal --> Network | SAP Help Portal and Hierarchy | SAP Help Portal.

Activation

  • A new Settings Menu is available in the Model Screen.
  • From this menu, users can toggle Inline Data Preview ON or OFF.

Functionality

  • When Inline Data Preview is enabled and a function is selected in Network or Hierarchy view, a Show Element panel becomes available at the bottom of the screen.
  • This Show Element provides functionality like the Show Element in the Report Screen, including:
    • Toggle Buttons to switch between Embedded Mode and Full Mode.
    • An option to open the Show Screen in a separate browser tab.
    • Access to Show Actions.

Event Logs Tab

  • The Show Element includes an Event Logs tab.
  • This tab displays relevant logs for the selected function, helping users track activity and troubleshoot as needed.

Data Editing

If data is editable in the Show Screen, it is also editable in the Show Element within the Inline DataPreview.

Delete improvements

The “Delete” option should appear in the context menu only when it is applicable to the selected node.

Specifically, it should not be shown for:

  • Fulfilled folders, or
  • Nodes that are used as input functions

 Show Screen

   Enhanced Event Log Filtering with Multi-Selection Capability

We have improved the Event Logs section in the Data Screen to significantly enhance user experience when analyzing the lifecycle or history of records. Previously users could only select one Event Type at a time or choose "All," which often cluttered the view with irrelevant entries (e.g., numerous READ events), making detailed analysis cumbersome. 

Now: 

  • Multi-Selection Enabled: Users can now select multiple Event Types simultaneously (e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) using the Event Type filter available under Additional Filters in the Event Logs panel. 
  • Streamlined Record Review: The Event Logs list dynamically responds to the selected Event Types, displaying only the events that matter most to you. 
  • "All" Option Remains Available: For broader analysis, users can still opt to display all events. 
  • Default Selection: By default, the Event Type filter pre-selects the most critical Event Types—CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE—ensuring a cleaner, more relevant initial view without requiring manual adjustments. 

User Benefits: 

  • Focus only on important record changes without distraction from less critical events. 
  • Save time by avoiding repetitive manual filtering. 

  Drill Down into Key Figures with Detail Data Display in Pivot Mode

We’re excited to introduce a powerful enhancement —Detail Data Display in Pivot Mode in Data Screen. This new feature gives you deeper insights into your data by allowing you to explore the individual records behind aggregated values directly from the pivot screen, since understanding what contributes to your KPIs is just as important as seeing the number itself. With this enhancement, you no longer have to guess where figures come from—you can now see the exact detail records that make up any aggregated value, right from the report view. 

Key Highlights 

  1. Clickable Key Figures 

In Pivot Mode, all key figures are now displayed as interactive links. Simply click on any value to reveal the detail records that contribute to it. 

  1. Contextual Detail Records 

Once clicked, a second show screen appears at the bottom of the report. This display applies all: 

  • Show screen filters, 
  • Dimension values from column labels and row groups, and 
  • The correct aggregation logic (e.g., SUM) 

The total result of this list always matches the original key figure—ensuring complete transparency and accuracy. 

  1. Additional Data Analysis 

You can also perform additional data analysis by  

  • applying filters to second show element with detailed data  
  • and creating pivot mode aggregation  
  1. Search with Ease 

A full-text search tool in the detail display enables quick filtering across all visible fields—perfect for zeroing in on specific transactions or records. 

  1. Persistent Layout 

Your customized view matters. The system remembers your layout preferences, including the state and size of the detail section, and restores them next time you access the screen. 

What This Means for Users 

This update is designed to: 

  • Enhance data transparency, 
  • Improve root cause analysis, 
  • Support faster decision-making, and 
  • Eliminate the need to switch between screens or perform manual lookups. 

Whether you’re analyzing financial reports, auditing activities, or exploring operational KPIs, this feature simplifies the journey from summary to detail in just one click. 

 Default Expansion of Parent-Child Records in Layouts 

Layouts now store and restore the expanded state of parent-child records (business objects) automatically when loading Data Screens. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Efficiency: No need to manually expand records after each screen load. 
  • Consistency: Screens reopen exactly as configured, saving time and effort. 
  • Improved Usability: Enhanced navigation when working with hierarchical data structures. 

How It Works: 

  1. Expand the desired parent-child records during layout setup. 
  2. Save the layout. 
  3. Upon reopening, the system automatically applies the stored expanded or collapsed state. 

 Process

  Creation of Team based on User Email 

In the Manage Event Logs, user email address is automatically added to the list under User Teams. 

This means that users can now also create a Team in Manage Teams screen based on user email address. In addition, the Team attribute in Manage Teams during its creation can now be composed of up to 253 characters of lowercase and uppercase letters, numbers and/or special characters (“_”, “-”, “.”, and “@”) with no space in between. 

On the other hand, creation of Team mapped to SAP BTP User Attribute is still possible. 

For more information about Teams, you may check our Application Help for Universal Model: Manage Teams. 

  Report

   Default Expansion of Parent-Child Records in Layouts in Show Element

We can also change the layout to see the expanded state of parent-child records (business objects) in embedded Show Elements. Just the same as in Data Screen. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Efficiency: No need to manually expand records after each screen load. 
  • Consistency: Screens reopen exactly as configured, saving time and effort. 
  • Improved Usability: Enhanced navigation when working with hierarchical data structures. 

How It Works: 

  1. When setting up the data in Show Element, expand the desired parent-child records  
  1. Save the Element. 

Upon reopening, the system automatically applies the stored expanded or collapsed state. 

  Reference Link to Show Screen

You can now create reference links to Data Screens (with Layouts) directly in your reports! 

Enhancement Details: 

  • A new tab called “Show Functions” has been added to the Reference Dialog. 

  • This tab allows users to easily configure a link to any layout of Data Screen of a specific function. 
  • It provides a flexible way to direct report users to a predefined Data Screen view, enhancing navigation and usability across the system. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Faster navigation: Direct users to specific Data Screens without manual searching. 
  • Streamlined reporting: Embed meaningful links into reports for quicker insights. 
  • Customization: Choose both the function and layout you want the link to point to. 

How It Works: 

  1. Open the Reference Dialog while configuring your report. 
  2. Switch to the new Show Functions tab. 
  3. Select the Function and the Layout you want to reference. 
  4. Insert the link into your report content. 

  Citation Feature for Joule Responses

Joule now offers a Citation Feature to enhance transparency and build greater trust in generated responses! 

Enhancement Details: 

  • Citations (Sources) are now displayed alongside Joule’s responses and follow-up questions. 
  •  Citations are shown in clear, user-readable text. 
  • Interactive experience: Clicking on a citation highlights the corresponding source element on the page. 
  • Citations are visually formatted to be clearly distinguishable and user-friendly. 

Key Benefits: 

  • Transparency: Easily verify the sources behind Joule's responses. 
  • Better user experience: Quickly navigate to supporting sources without confusion. 
  • Improved accuracy: Each citation is tied to the exact part of the response it supports. 

How It Works: 

  1. When Joule generates a response or follow-up question, citations will appear alongside it. 
  2. Each citation is clickable, taking you directly to the referenced source element. 
  3. Citations are formatted cleanly, making it easy to differentiate sources from the main content. 

That’s all for this update!

We hope these new features and enhancements help you get even more out of SAP PaPM UM. Don’t forget to check back during the first week of each month for the latest “What’s New” posts. If you find this helpful, feel free to share it with your colleagues and network. Thanks for reading!

entry.title: Conflict Using Fixed Bin & General Storage Strategies in Storage Type BL01 – SAP cloud
entry.content:
We are currently working on warehouse configuration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (2502 release) and are facing a limitation related to the use of fixed bin strategy alongside the general storage area putaway rule within the same storage type.

  • When we enable the “Use Fixed Bins” indicator in the storage type configuration (via SSCUI 103045), the system only allows us to select the “Addition to Existing Stock/Empty Bin” as the Putaway Rule.

  • As soon as “Use Fixed Bins” is enabled, the “General Storage Area” rule becomes unavailable in the drop-down list.

  • Our current storage type BL01 uses the General Storage Area strategy, and it has been working as intended for dynamic bin determination.

  • However, we now have a requirement to implement Fixed Bin allocation for certain products in the same storage type, but this is not supported due to the system restriction mentioned above. if we change to Addition to Existing Stock/Empty Bin” as the Putaway rule it hampers our ongoing process.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud: Client-Side Simulation for process parameters used in a modeling function
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am trying to determine how to implement a client-side simulation script for the following scenario:

Consider this function:

The complex selection script for the second level consists of these rules:

  • R0001: WHERE DRIVER_SPESE_LIQ = :I_SPESE_LIQ

  • R0002: WHERE DRIVER_SPESE_AMM = :I_SPESE_AMM

  • R0003: WHERE DRIVER_SPESE_ACQ = :I_SPESE_ACQ

Therefore, the result of the top-level rule, "From," is dependent on three parameters defined in the process: :I_SPESE_LIQ (e.g., RISERVA_MAT), :I_SPESE_AMM (PREMI), and :I_SPESE_ACQ (RISERVA_MAT)

This function influences the outcome of an allocation function, for which I have created the following report:

In this report, the expenses on the right side are distributed to TAR1 and TAR2 (on the left side), based on the values of the three parameters mentioned earlier shown in the center.   

How should I write the client-side script to observe how the expense distribution changes when I modify the parameters, such as:

  • :I_SPESE_LIQ = LIQUIDAZ (previously RISERVA_MAT)
  • :I_SPESE_AMM = PREMI (remains the same)
  • :I_SPESE_ACQ = LIQUIDAZ (previously RISERVA_MAT)

So the expected results is to see the report change like this:

When I change the parameters in the report section and apply the changes, nothing happens. The "Simulate" button is unusable unless I provide a script in the "Client-side simulation" panel.

Could someone please assist me with this?

Thank you

Best regards

Daniela C.

entry.title: Re: Configuring SAML2.0 based Single Sign-On for NetWeaver 7.3 Portal
entry.content:
Hi,

We tried configuring with the above steps provided and it is working halfway through, we are still getting a login screen to authenticate where it does not ask credentials, it shows the system/alias name under a drop down and continue/cancel button; after clicking on continue it redirects to the required page. Could you let us know what changes need to be done in configuration.

 

Regards,

Vedant

entry.title: Multi Action and Conditionals
entry.content:
Hello!!

Is there a way to put an execution condition on a multi action on SAC? For example, between 2 data actions, put a condition so that the second one would be executed only if an account x = 100 (result of the calculation of  last step in the first data action).

.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Shaik Azmathulla - January 2025 Edition
entry.content: Thanks, Prabhakar! Totally agree . SAP can be tricky at times, especially with those notes, but there’s always something fascinating to uncover. Keeps the journey exciting!

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja 

We are using the latest release of Custom Code Migration App (F3191 Version 2502.0.1) on SAP BTP ABAP Cloud Release 2502.

We created a new S4 Conversion project, connected to backend, implemented all notes and uploaded usage data in order to generate the scoping proposal. So far so good, but the Scoping that is coming from the App as a default has many obvious wrong results.

Very obvious is for example a report that is In Scope but contains some includes that are Not in scope? How should this work? Same with active User-Exits and BAdIs that are set to "Not in Scope".

On every S4 event from SAP this App is well advertised but now that we are using it for a couple of weeks, we are disappointed so far. Beside those wrong results, missing features (for example export of complete scoping result) and also tracking for example to mark packages that are already checked.

entry.title: SAP on IBM i Webcast: IBM i 7.6 now available - What is in it for SAP Solutions?
entry.content:
On April 8, 2025, IBM has announced the new release IBM i 7.6. Following the necessities of a highly connected IT world, security enhancements are in the center of this new IBM i release. In the next SAP on IBM i webcast, Ron Schmerbauch and Christian Bartels of IBM will have a look at some of the important new features in IBM i 7.6 and how system administrators can integrate these features with existing SAP systems.

The webcast is scheduled for Thursday May 21, at 4 pm CEST, 10 am EDT, 7:30 pm IST. Please visit the website at ibm.biz/SAP_on_IBM_i_Webcast to register for the webcast. In reply, you will receive a calendar entry to your email address with all the information that you need to join the webcast.

As usual, questions are welcome during the session. Some general Q&A time is also reserved at the end of the webcast for general questions about IBM i 7.6 or whatever else you may have in mind, and for your suggestions about possible topics for future webcasts.

If you can’t make the live session, a replay will be made available for registrants.

We hope to see you there!

entry.title: Re: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool...
entry.content: Out developers did create a customer Z report but it basically mimics RFFOAVIS_FPAYM. We need a way to export or download the payment advice in the correct for. Or, we need a way to change who the email goes to. Similar to how it works in SOST. My thought was to copy RFFOAVIS_FPAYM and modify from there. The issue is, it does not work as the download and spool aren't in the correct form. If we could get the correct form in download/spool, we wouldn't need the email functionality because we could just email from our desktop.

entry.title: Re: Cannot Edit Business Object after transport to P
entry.content: Hello, good morning, were you able to edit the CBO after transporting it? I have the same problem! I need to edit it in Development but I can't anymore because I transported it to Quality

entry.title: Re: How to attach the uploaded files of sap BPA to email
entry.content:
To attach uploaded files from SAP Build Process Automation to an email, you can follow these best practices and steps:

Best Practices for Sending Multiple Attachments

  • Send Multiple Attachments in an Email: You can send multiple attachments in an email using SAP Build Process Automation. This workflow example demonstrates how to send multiple attachments in an email 

Steps to Configure Attachment Destination

  1. Navigate to your SAP BTP subaccount.
  2. Choose Connectivity > Destinations and then New Destination.
  3. Enter the following details:
    • Name: sap_process_automation_document_store (This is the required name. Please don't use another one.)
    • Type: HTTP
    • URL: {cmis}/browser/<repository-id> (Make sure that the URL points to a repository without /root/. Otherwise, you'll run into a 405 error.)
    • Proxy Type: Internet
    • Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials (For more information, see OAuth Client Credentials Authentication.)
    • Client ID: <client ID>
    • Client Secret: <client secret>
    • Token Service URL: <uaa-url>/oauth/token
    • Token Service URL Type: Dedicated
  4. Choose Save.
    • The attachment destination is now available in your SAP BTP subaccount.
  5. Check that the service has been configured correctly by creating or opening an existing form in the process editor and looking for the File element. For more information, see File Upload in Form Input Fields

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow in Sales Documents

entry.title: Re: How to create a RAP BO to change the content of a customizing table in the production client
entry.content:
Hi @patrick_winkler,

You mention here

'For A tables, you can use any of the other ADT wizards to create a RAP BO/OData service binding and then manually create an SMBC object for integration in the CUBCO app."

However this seems far from straightforward. If I try to create via ADT, I have to create a singleton as it is not generated by the normal UI (or web api?) generator. This means that I have to remove fact that my root view is a root view + delete the behaviour as the singleton should be the root.

Am I missing something?

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Empowering Through Learning: Sandra’s Path to SAP Champion
entry.content:
When Sandra first shared her story with us in December 2023, she was already making waves in the SAP Community. An ABAP developer and systems engineer from Mexico, she turned an early career setback—failing an ABAP certification exam—into motivation. What followed was a passionate journey of learning, teaching, and deepening her connection to the SAP ecosystem. Today, Sandra is not only a certified expert in her field, but she has also been named an SAP Champion, in recognition of her contributions to the global community. 

New Certifications, New Confidence 

Since our last conversation, Sandra has earned two new SAP Certifications to her resumé including SAP Certified Associate – Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud.  “Earning these certifications was a major personal achievement for me, especially because I had developed a fear of certifications after failing the ABAP 7.50 exam in the past.” 

These milestones didn’t just mark progress in her skills; they also rebuilt her confidence. Her commitment to learning and helping others thrive has become a central part of her identity. Through her YouTube channel, Mundo ABAPer, she continues to empower Spanish-speaking developers with technical insights, learning hacks, and encouragement. 

“I’m passionate about continuous learning, developing efficient solutions for my customers, and helping others that are starting as SAP developers, to make their journey easier.” 

From Learner to Leader 

Sandra’s contributions extend far beyond certifications. She was featured in SAP Advocate Antonio Maradiaga “Code Talk” podcast, where they discussed ABAP in Spanish. She won Devtoberfest by SAP TechEd for a second time—an accolade that allowed her to attend SAP TechEd in Florida in 2024. And in 2025, Sandra became an SAP Champion, an honor that reflects not only her technical expertise but also her dedication to knowledge-sharing, mentorship, and inclusion within the community.   

“My learning journey is a part of why I became an SAP Champion,” she admits. “By sharing not just my successes but also my struggles, I was able to connect with others and encourage them to keep going.  

“My goal was always to build a supportive and inclusive learning environment, and I think SAP recognized that passion for community and knowledge-sharing.” 

Building for the Future 

Looking ahead, Sandra has her eyes set on the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model certification and plans to expand her YouTube channel into a sustainable platform for education and inspiration. Her dream? To combine her technical knowledge with her love of content creation and make it her full-time work. 

Whatever her future brings, Sandra will always be a firm advocate of the SAP Learning site: “It’s a great opportunity to improve your skills and advance your career, regardless of where you’re starting from,” she shares. “Even if you are new to SAP, there are a lot of paths and journeys for beginners, you don’t need to be an expert.” 

Her advice to anyone starting their SAP journey is simple but powerful: “Start where you are, use what you have, and do what you can.” 

Start your SAP Learning Journey today 

Did you feel inspired by Sandra’s story? Then kick-start your own success story with SAP today. Benefit from tailored and self-paced learning opportunities that meet you when and where you learn best. Get certified to demonstrate your expertise and boost your career.

entry.title: Re: MyInbox - Refresh tasklist from own component in deta...
entry.content:
Hi,

you can use the My Inbox API, there you should have a method to refresh the task list.

Hope it helps,
Ludgero Simões

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing for Pharma Industry
entry.content: Do you have any updates regarding this issue ? Electronic Batch Record is usually being implemented via 3rd party MES applications integrated with SAP

entry.title: From IT Support to SAP Consultant: A Learner’s Evolution
entry.content:
For Nwankwo Chinonso—known to colleagues as Charles—every step in his career has been shaped by resilience, a hunger for learning, and a knack for recognizing the right opportunities. Raised in southeastern Nigeria as the third of four siblings, Charles developed a deep curiosity for technology early on. After earning a degree in Computer Engineering, he moved to Lagos in 2019, driven by a clear goal: to build a meaningful career in IT. Despite his solid foundation in IT support—specializing in troubleshooting and software upgrades—breaking into the right role wasn’t easy. He often found himself praying for an opportunity that would not only match his skills but also fuel his passion for innovation. 

Finding the Right Path 

Charles’ prayers were answered during his mandatory National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) program. “I discovered the SAP Young Professionals Program through a local community initiative focused on sharing job opportunities,” he recalls. “It was actually a WhatsApp group where members exchanged valuable information.” 

The program—still thriving today—offers recent graduates in Nigeria the opportunity to develop skills in Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), analytics, and business process transformation. Intrigued by the reach and impact of SAP, Charles applied and was thrilled to be selected as one of just 27 candidates. “The rest, as they say, is history,” he says with a smile. 

What followed was a transformative period of intensive learning, practical application, and personal growth, culminating in four SAP Certifications with a specialization in SAP S/4HANA. But for Charles, learning has never been about just collecting credentials. He describes the experience as both rewarding and life-changing—one that equipped him with the critical technical expertise and soft skills needed to thrive in today’s corporate world. 

From Certification to Transformation 

Since then, Charles has carved out an impressive career as a Senior SAP Consultant, guiding manufacturing and other enterprises through complex digital transformations with SAP solutions. His journey with SAP has not only accelerated his professional growth but also opened doors to financial stability, global travel, and a wealth of invaluable industry experience.  

For Charles, the rewards have extended far beyond the workplace—shaping both his career and his worldview. “My SAP Certifications have significantly enhanced my communication abilities, interpersonal relationships, leadership qualities, problem-solving skills, and business acumen, including decision-making.” Charles is now leading a movement called ‘SAP saturdays’, designed to equip students with SAP skills for both today and tomorrow." 

Start Your Own Success Story  

Charles’ story is proof that obtaining the right skills, combined with determination and the courage to seize opportunities, can change the course of a career, and open doors to a better life.  

Are you ready to begin your SAP journey? Explore SAP Learning and take the first step to transform your future.

entry.title: Re: MyInbox - Refresh tasklist from own component in detail-area
entry.content: how come sap is not doing it? I embedded fiori element object as task detail, seems sap is doing the refresh, I don't have to do it myself.

entry.title: Re: Life Cycle Management in SAP Datasphere: Transporting Content between Tenants
entry.content: @Geetha_Madhuri_Bobbili Does Datasphere support transport of security roles (both Global and Space roles) ? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: how to REALLY extend Adobe forms on public cloud?
entry.content:
Did anyone find a suitable solution here?

 

I am actually trying to extend the service SD_SLS_FDP_V1_QUOTATION_SRV of the Sales Quotation form, by introducing the Bill of Material lines for all the materials in the sales quotation.

My first strategy was to create a new custom field (by using the Custom Fields and Logic App) which will take values from a custom CDS view which returns the BOM lines. This custom field should extend the data source for the form SD_SLS_FDP_V1_QUOTATION_SRV.

The actual problem I am facing is that in order to create such a custom field I need the proper business context, which is not available unfortunately.


Any community ideas would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Sap Build Work Zone Standard Edition 3 times login ne...
Re: a MRP Run Result Question
entry.content:
Hello

If your rescheduling horizon is too long and if you have firm receipts far in the future, MRP will always try to first reschedule the firm receipt and only after that it will create new replenishment elements. Your screenshot does not show the entire horizon, so you should scroll down and check if you have any firm receipt with a rescheduling date in MD04. 

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: New live session!! Support of AI in daily work of internal sales representative - Register now
entry.content:
Overview
In this session, we will cover the following topics:

  • Sales order creation process
  • Customer data search
  • Sales order search
  • Error handling with AI support

Learning objectives
After participating in this live session, you will be able to create sales orders, search for sales and customer data, and handle errors, all with the support of new AI functionality.

Live Session schedule

Support of AI in daily work of internal sales representative in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
May 13, 2025, 10:00 - 11:00 GMT+2Register
Support of AI in daily work of internal sales representative in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
May 13, 2025, 17:00 - 18:00 GMT+2Register

entry.title: Re: How to Map Parent-Child Relationship for Both Custome...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,
Multiple customer master records representing the same legal entity can be consolidated into a single, unified record known as the Golden Record.

Consolidating Customer Master Data
Business Partner Relationships
BP Relationship for Credit and Lability

The list of all relationship categories in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud :-

RelCatDescriptionDescriptionTitle
BBP002Has the Invoicing PartyIs the Invoicing Party OfInvoicing Party Rel.
BUR001Has Contact PersonIs Contact Person forContact Person Rel.ship
BUR002Has Activity PartnerIs Activity Partner forAct. Partner Relationship
BUR003Has Shared Living Arrangement MemberBelongs to Shared Living ArrangementShared Living Arrangement
BUR004Is Married to Marriage
BUR006Is identical to Alias (Identity)
BUR010Has the EmployeeIs Employee ofEmployee Relationship
BUR011Has the Employee ResponsibleIs the Employee Responsible forResponsible Employee
BUR013Is Replaced byReplacesReplacement Relationship
BUR020Has DepartmentIs Department ofDepartment
BUR021Has ChildIs Child ofParent-Child Relationship
BUR022Is GuardianHas GuardianGuardian Relationship
BUR023Is Related to Relationship
BUR024Has Partner in Marriage PartnershipBelongs to Marriage PartnershipMarriage Partnership
BUR025Has Service PerformerIs Service Performer ForService Performer
BUR028Has Collaboration UserIs Collaboration User forCollaboration User
BUR030Is Legal Entity ForBelongs to Legal EntityLegal Entity Relationship
BUR101Has Ordering AddressIs Ordering Address ForOrdering Address
BUR102Has Invoicing PartyIs Invoicing Party ForInvoicing Party
BUR103Has Goods SupplierIs Goods Supplier ForGoods supplier
BUR104Has Manufacturing SiteIs Manufacturing Site ForManufacturing Site
BUR105Has Warehouse LocationIs Warehouse Location ForWarehouse Location
BUR106Has Alternative PayeeIs Alternative Payee ForAlternative Payee
BUR998Is Partner ofIs Partner ofPartner Relationship
BURC01Is Shareholder ofHas ShareholderShareholder Relationship
CHM001Responsible for Channel PartnerResponsible Channel Manager UnitCHM - Relationship
CHM002Has the Ship-To Party/RecipientIs the Ship-To Party/Recipient OfShip-To Party Relship
CHM003Corporate Family Has the MemberIs Member of Corporate FamilyCompany Group
CHM004Has Third PartyIs Third Party OfThird Party
CHM005Has the Responsible Partner ContactIs Responsible Partner Contact ForResp. Partner Contact
CPG001Has the Sold-To PartyIs the Sold-To Party OfSold-To Party Relationshp
CRMD01Is Sales Partner OfHas Sales PartnerSales Partn. Relationship
CRME01Is Trader ForHas TraderTrader Relationship
CRME02Has End CustomerIs End Customer OfTrader - End Customer
CRME03Is Service CenterHas Service CenterService Center Relship
CRMH00Has an Undefined Relationship WithIs the Undefined Partner OfUndefined Relationship
CRMH02Has the Ship-To Party/RecipientIs the Ship-To Party/Recipient OfShip-To Party Relship
CRMH03Has the PayerIs the Payer OfPayer Relationship
CRMH04Has the Bill-To PartyIs the Bill-To Party OfBill-To Party Relship
CRMH06Has the Responsible Business PartnerIs Responsible Business Partner ForPerson Responsible
CRMH07Has the WholesalerIs Wholesaler ForWholesaler
CRMI01Has the Personal ContactIs Personal Contact OfPersonal Contact
CRMM01Has the Alternative PayerIs Alternative Payer ForAlternative Payer Relship
CRMM02Has the PayeeIs Payee ForPayee Relationship
CRMM03Has Correspondence RecipientIs Correspondence Recipient ForCorr.Recipient Relship
CRMM04Has Dunning RecipientIs Dunning Recipient ForDunning Recipient Relship
CRMS01Has the CarrierIs the Carrier ForCarrier
CRMS02Manages Entitlements FromEntitlements Are Managed ByManager for Entitlements
CRMS03Is the Responsible Scrapper ForHas the Responsible ScrapperResponsible Scrapper
CRMS09Is the Remanufacturer ForHas the RemanufacturerRemanufacturer
EDO001Singapore: Has Peppol Endpoint IDSingapore: Is Peppol Endpoint ID ofSG: Peppol Endpoint ID
EWM001Has the Dock Appointment Scheduling PlannerIs the Dock Appointment Scheduling Planner OfDock App. Sched. Planner
FI0200Has the alternative payerIs an alternative payer forAlternative payer
FI0210Has the authorized payersIs an authorized payer forAuthorized payers
FI0300Has the alternative dunning recipientIs alternative dunning recipient forAltern. dunning recipient
FS0030Borrower Entity MemberHas the MemberBorrower Entity Member
FSB001is a shareholder ofhas the shareholderPrivat Co. with partners
FSB002Is subsidiary ofIs parent company ofParent company/subsidiary
HCM001Has EmploymentIs Employment ForEmployment
HCM002Has External EmploymentIs External Employment ForExternal Employment
HCM003Has Service Performer ContractIs Service Performer Contract ForService Perform. Contract
HEA010Has Hospital EmployeeIs employed inHospital Employee
HEA020Has Hospital EmployeeIs employed inHospital Employee
ICM001Has the Responsible OrganizationIs the Responsible Organization ForOrganization Responsible
ICM002Has the External OrganizationIs the External Organization ForExternal Organization
ICM003Has External PersonIs the External Person ForExternal Person
IHS001Has medical addressIs medical addressMedical Address
ISHAPHHas Attending PhysicianIs Attending Physician ForAttending Physician
ISHINSHas Health Insurance ProviderIs Health Insurance Provider ForHealth Insurance
JIT001Has Contact Person for Just-In-Time ProcessesIs Contact Person for Just-In-Time ProcessesContact Person for JIT
LM0001Has the ProcessorIs a Processor OfProcessor Relationship
LM0002Has Responsible for GroupIs Responsible for GroupGroup Responsibility Rel.
LM0003Has a SubgroupIs a Subgroup OfExecuting Subgroup
SCM001Has the SNC UserIs the SNC User OfSNC Partner User
TM0001Has Sales RepresentativeIs Sales RepresentativeSales Representative
UDM001has Collection contact personis Collection contact person forCollections Relationship
UKM001Superordinate Credit Account FromSubordinate Credit Account ToCM Account Hierarchy
UKMSB0managed in Credit Managementin Credit Management is managed byCM Processor
UKMSBGhas  Employeesis in credit analyist groupCredit Analyist Group

If you need more help for any of the relationships categories mentioned above please a support ticket.

Kind regards,
Bhawesh

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Repository - inheri...
entry.content:
Good day Andreas,

 

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community!  It is recommended that you 

create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have an expert look into this specific issue.

 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center. 

 

Kind regards,

 

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP Yard Logistics: Visual Business Screen Not Displayed
entry.content:
Hello rejhan,

I am also facinf the similar issue.
Could you please let me know if you found the solution ?
Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: a MRP Run Result Question
entry.content: Your answer is correct. I had figured out that as you mentioned. there was a long list for that.

entry.title: Re: Event Based Revenue Recognition - deferred revenue po...
entry.content:
Hello @Martin,

To defer revenue for prepaid (TAD/Z) items in S/4HANA Public Cloud, you must assign the correct Revenue Recognition Key (e.g., TDR or SVC) to the item category via SSCUI 102639 – Assign Rev.. Recognition Keys. This ensures billing posts to a Deferred Revenue account, not P&L.

Changing account assignment groups (XA, X5, X9) in the product master alone won't control revenue timing.

Yes, even if you use a Service or Provider Contract, a Revenue Contract is still required for compliance (IFRS 15 / ASC 606). The system automatically creates one when billing via Event-Based Revenue Recognition (EBRR).

Required Scope Items:

  • 1GA – Event-Based Revenue Recognition – Sales Orders
  • 57Z – Subscription Billing Integration (optional, for usage/entitlement tracking)
  • 1J2 – Contract Accounting (optional)

Free feel to contact me if you need further information.

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Repository - inheri...
entry.content:
Hello Kantrice, for some reason today I was able to change and delete the roles in the root folder of the repository.
So it is working as intended now. Ty for your help.

entry.title: Can I assign more than one course at a time to a user group in Enable Now
entry.content: I am working with a client and we have assigned multiple users to a role to assign them to a course but we're wondering can we assign multiple courses at one time to a user group? For example, procurement has 50 courses and we want to assign all 50 at once.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori and AI – ERP1612
entry.content:
Oil & Gas Company
1A, 1C (very few) and 1E

2A

entry.title: Re: Error in CJI3 FIELD error in CJI3 FIELD MBGBTR - Tota...
entry.content: Please submit a ticket with SAP Support if you are using standard transactions and reports.  They can also help explain standard system behavior.

entry.title: is it possible to archive data into sap BTP DMS ? for ex: archiving of object BC_DBLOGS
entry.content:
Hi 

I know that we can use sap BTP DMS for archiving   unstructured data like images, Documents. But 

1) is it possible to use sap BTP DMS to archive structured data ex: BC_DBLOGS, BC_SBAL archiving objects?

2)  please   share document to connect Rise with sap system to sap btp DMS content repository

Thanks

sudhakar.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @Lance_Genesis it is great to meet you. I'm glad that you've joined the community to engage, learn, and also have fun!

entry.title: SAP BTP iOS Trial error - 404 in WebViewAuthenticator and no logs
entry.content:
I try to set up a native iOS app with the SAP BTP iOS SDK from scratch.
(I followed the guidelines and configured both the Mobile Services Cockpit and the app.)
When I try to log in with the app, during the onboarding, I get a 404 error in the WebViewAuthenticator after entering and sending the user password. Unfortunately there is no logging during the WebView, so I have no idea what's wrong or going on.
Any idea what can be the problem or how to solve or get some log entries?

entry.title: Convergent Invoicing: Contract item field in billing plan is coming as blank
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using detailed billing plan in SOM and CI and when Provider contract and associated billing plan is created, the Contract item field is not mapped to the billing plan items. The VTPOS field is blank in DFKKBIX_BIP_I and in FKKBIX_BILLPLAN screen, the VTPOS field has value '0'.  Any idea, if this is because of any missing config or any SAP Note needs to be implemented Kindly share if you know the solution. Thanks in Advance.

 

#BRIM 

#CI

#SOM

@deepak_dash

entry.title: “Add new employee to onboarding” > event reasons appear in different languages for admins vs. HR BPs
entry.content: In the “Add new employee to onboarding” action, our admins have the German names to choose from in the event reason dropdown, but the HR Business Partners only have the English versions. The aim is for the German version to be displayed for both roles. How and where do I set this as an admin?
